utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each is fully specified: (1) property includes address, details, price, currency, and viewing schedule; (2) financing includes solution, terms, amount, and currency; (3) legal_services includes service_type, cost, currency, and status; (4) moving_services includes service_type, cost, currency, features, and status; (5) setup_services includes utility_services and survey_costs with details, costs, currencies, and statuses; (6) total_budget includes cost breakdown, grand total, currency, and status. All are complete and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property described as a 'Burlington area detached house' priced at CAD $695,000. In the ground-truth ratings, the most similar purchase option (in both description and price) is the 'Family House' at CAD $650K with a rating of 10. For financing, the assistant chose 'Cash purchase', which matches the 'Cash Purchase' option in the purchase_financing section with a rating of 5. The legal service chosen is 'Real estate closing documentation, title searches, legal representation' costing CAD $1350, which aligns most closely with the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9) since it covers comprehensive due diligence. The survey chosen is a 'Property survey and inspection' at CAD $575, closest to 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9) in scope and price. The moving service described as 'Premium family relocation with full packing and unpacking services' corresponds to 'Premium Moving' (rating 9). The utility setup includes multiple services costing CAD $435, which best aligns with 'Business Setup' (rating 5) due to its higher cost and comprehensive inclusion of multiple utilities, even though the ideal family choice would have been 'Premium Utilities'.
